/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/lib CMakeFiles/ghostlayer.dir/src/app_state.c.o CMakeFiles/ghostlayer.dir/src/bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/ghostlayer.dir/src/gui/about_dialog.c.o CMakeFiles/ghostlayer.dir/src/gui/iface_dialog.c.o CMakeFiles/ghostlayer.dir/src/gui/main_gui.c.o CMakeFiles/ghostlayer.dir/src/gui/packet_viewer.c.o CMakeFiles/ghostlayer.dir/src/gui/statusbar.c.o CMakeFiles/ghostlayer.dir/src/gui/toolbar.c.o CMakeFiles/ghostlayer.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/ghostlayer.dir/src/utilities.c.o -o ghostlayer  _deps/ccsds-build/libccsds.a -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lintl
